question: Can you first find the terminus cities of Route 66, among the citites, which one had higher binge drinking prevalence in both 2016 and 2018 city health data? For that city, identify the department with the highest total overtime costs from 2014 to 2017, then report the starting salary of that department in 2025. Return the dollar amount only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: According to the Wikipedia article for Springfield, Missouri, 'Springfield's nicknames include "Queen City of the Ozarks" and "The Birthplace of Route 66"...Officially recognized as the birthplace of Route 66, it was in Springfield on April 30, 1926, that officials first proposed the name of the new Chicago-to-Los Angeles highway.'
1.subquestion: What are the terminus cities of the highway that was born in Springfield, Missouri?

2.fact: In the 500-Cities 2016 health data release, the binge drinking prevalence (city-level, crude) was: Chicago 20.1% and Los Angeles 15.9%. Chicago had higher binge drinking prevalence.
2.subquestion: Which terminus city (from <node_1 answer>) had higher average binge drinking prevalence across the 2016 and 2018 city health releases? (Filter for this node: Short_Question_Text == 'Binge Drinking'; GeographicLevel == 'City'; Data_Value_Type == 'Crude prevalence'; CityName in {Chicago, Los Angeles}; use Data_Value.)

3.fact: In the 500-Cities 2018 health data release, the binge drinking prevalence (city-level, crude) was: Chicago 21.5% and Los Angeles 16.7%. Chicago had higher binge drinking prevalence.
3.subquestion: Which terminus city (from <node_1 answer>) had higher average binge drinking prevalence across the 2016 and 2018 city health releases? (Filter for this node: Short_Question_Text == 'Binge Drinking'; GeographicLevel == 'City'; Data_Value_Type == 'Crude prevalence'; CityName in {Chicago, Los Angeles}; use Data_Value.)

4.fact: In the 2014 Chicago Employee Overtime data, the top departments by total overtime were: Police ($101,460,132.24), Fire ($63,941,565.36), Water Management ($23,507,061.70), Streets and Sanitation ($15,393,693.24), and Aviation ($13,147,383.40). Police had the highest.
4.subquestion: Which city department had the highest total overtime from 2014-2017 in the city identified from the binge drinking comparison? (Filter for this node: group by DEPARTMENT NAME; sum TOTAL; rank by total; keep top departments.)

5.fact: In the 2015 Chicago Employee Overtime data, the top departments by total overtime were: Police ($116,144,553.32), Fire ($43,847,384.30), Water Management ($19,954,056.68), Streets and Sanitation ($16,582,331.52). Police had the highest.
5.subquestion: Which city department had the highest total overtime from 2014-2017 in the city identified from the binge drinking comparison? (Filter for this node: group by DEPARTMENT NAME; sum TOTAL; rank by total; keep top departments.)

6.fact: In the 2016 Chicago Employee Overtime data, the top departments by total overtime were: Police ($143,032,724.45), Fire ($50,604,010.67), Water Management ($21,335,912.52), Streets and Sanitation ($13,836,742.94). Police had the highest.
6.subquestion: Which city department had the highest total overtime from 2014-2017 in the city identified from the binge drinking comparison? (Filter for this node: group by DEPARTMENT NAME; sum TOTAL; rank by total; keep top departments.)

7.fact: In the 2017 Chicago Employee Overtime data, the top departments by total overtime were: Police ($156,732,988), Fire ($49,571,354), Water Management ($20,049,910), Aviation ($14,884,756). Police had the highest.
7.subquestion: Which city department had the highest total overtime from 2014-2017 in the city identified from the binge drinking comparison? (Filter for this node: group by DEPARTMENT NAME; sum TOTAL; rank by total; keep top departments.)

8.fact: Starting salary for Chicago police officers in 2025 is $61,782, which is increased to $93,186 after 18 months.
8.subquestion: What is the starting salary in 2025 for officers in the department identified in the overtime comparison?

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Route 66 was the Chicago-to-Los Angeles highway
Result: termini are Chicago and Los Angeles
Node 2: 2016 binge drinking - Chicago 20.1%, Los Angeles 15.9% -> Chicago higher
Node 3: 2018 binge drinking - Chicago 21.5%, Los Angeles 16.7% -> Chicago higher
Node 8: Starting salary in 2025 for Chicago police officers is $61,782
